parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "action": "saveBooking",
  "name": "WA-{{ $('WhatsApp Webhook').item.json.body.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].from }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('WhatsApp Webhook').item.json.body.entry[0].changes[0].value.messages[0].from }}",
  "car": "{{ $('Parse Response').item.json.hasBooking ? $('Parse Response').item.json.booking.car : '' }}",
  "date": "{{ $('Parse Response').item.json.hasBooking ? $('Parse Response').item.json.booking.date : '' }}",
  "time": "{{ $('Parse Response').item.json.hasBooking ? $('Parse Response').item.json.booking.time : '' }}"
}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ ({body: "Sorry, I can only read text messages 😊 Please type your question and I'll help you right away!"}) }}
